title: Piglet RPG - Ridiculous Weapons
description: Adds a few fancy weapons balanced for survival
body:
Adds 5 fancy weapons balanced for survival. ## **Video:**
Spoiler
## **Features:** ![](https://i.ibb.co/zWwVcG71/Head-Hunter-Blunderbuss.png) * **Head Hunter's Blunderbuss** * shoots random vanilla **mob heads** with **unique effects** * **92 unique heads** in total * the heads have **fancy animations** * **9 damage** * uses **Soul Bullets** as ammo Recipes:

![](https://i.ibb.co/27CQtc0M/Pekka-Spatula.png) * **P.E.K.K.A.' s Spatula** * **melee** attack: **21 damage**, but very **low attack speed** * **randged** attack: right click to shoot **Pancakes** - they deal **1 damage** * a reference to **Clash Royale** Recipe:

![](https://i.ibb.co/R4Sk4s30/Stop-Sign.png) * **Stop Sign** * **7 damage** * **a bit slower** than Iron Sword * makes a **clang sound** * a reference to **Lethal Company** Recipe:

![](https://i.ibb.co/QvWxQHV2/Throwing-Up-Pills.png) * **Throw Up Pills** * when you eat them you throw up **slowly depleting** your **saturation and hunger bar** * mobs **in front of** you get **poisoned** Recipe:

![](https://i.ibb.co/hxPLNCNC/Up-Side-Down-Sword.png) * **Up Side Down Diamond Sword** * **7 damage** * **normal** sword **speed** * turns **most** entities **up side down** **Recipe:**

## **Compatibility:** * [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) * [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) (inventory sounds for all items) ## **Requirements** * [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) ## **Donation** **If you want to support me and help me creating even more mods consider buying me a glass of milk ;D** * **[https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond](https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond)** ## **Modpacks** Yeah, you **can** use it in your modpack! 😇 ![Affiliation Link](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1391621/description_e8b5b6b8-55c3-4fbd-a424-239aa4744363.png)
